title: COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: KO-KWEL WELLNESS CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to individuals and families. COVID-19 vaccines available; brand is Spikevax which is manufactured by Moderna. 630 Miluk Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and residents of the community as capacity allows COVID-19 vaccinations: Tribal members, CIT employees, Kilkich residents, and KWC patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Vaccinations: Fridays by appointment Medical Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 888-9494 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-9494 Option 1 Medical Clinic Toll-free (800) 344-8583 Medical Helpline (844) 829-0166 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Visit website for more information. FEES: Varies by service, sliding scale for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, and Lane Counties Services: COVID-19 Immunization Clinics * Native American Community Indian Health Service Clinics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KO-KWEL WELLNESS CENTER
